query:
SELECT
                            job_type,
                            COUNT(*)::INT4 AS "count!: i32",
                            EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ($1::timestamptz - MIN(execute_at)))::FLOAT8
                                AS "max_pending_duration_secs!: f64"
                        FROM job_executions
                        WHERE state = 'pending'
                        AND execute_at <= $1::timestamptz
                        AND job_type = ANY($2)
                        GROUP BY job_type
